pages.text: Combine Spectral Essence with Slime goo, add ice, sweet berries, and a bit of sugar to create this delicious, softly glowing blue sundae.$(br)Effects for the consumer:$(li)10 minutes of Saturation$(li)2 minutes of Regeneration$(li)2 minutes of Frost Protection$(li)Also restores 300 Soul Energy.$(br)It's the taste of Spectral Essence and Slimeballs, transformed into a Sweet Berry delight!
